about_lines: Made with рҹ’ҷ+рҹӨ– in Dresden, DE
description: Language-neutral UI text strings for the picker. Edit these to change the search prompt, status bar, and help screen without touching code. {count} is substituted with the live match count. Keep lines within the rendered content width (spec/layout.json) or they are truncated. Consumed by the Zig app. help_lines is the default help page (query starts with '?'); help_lines_more is the second page shown when the query starts with '??' and documents the e:/t: width filters. cursor_left/cursor_right are the cursor box drawn around the focused emoji (default вҢң вҢҹ; try [ ], вҹЁ вҹ©, в–Ҹ в–• вҖ” each must be one display cell). multi_select_mark is the glyph prefixed to emojis picked in multi-select mode вҖ” keep it a single display cell wide (e.g. вң“ вң” В· вҖў в–ё) so the 4-column grid stays aligned. When multi_select_mark is "" the mark is dropped and picked cells are instead highlighted with multi_select_bg (any color name from spec/colors.json вҖ” long like forest/teal or 3-letter short like grn/blu вҖ” or a 0-255 palette index). Rebuild (zig build) after editing since specs are embedded at compile time.
focus_lost_startup_lines: рҹ’Ў GTK apps have native picker.
help_lines_more: a b рҹ”Қ   Match all words
